summary: Tested 'The Room' rebranding and hosting method selection feature. All tests pass. Backend properly supports hosting_method field ('in_app', 'zoom', 'both') on lessons. Frontend displays correct join options based on teacher's hosting method selection.
passed_tests: Backend: Lesson response includes hosting_method field
Backend: Teacher can update hosting_method to 'in_app'
Backend: Teacher can update hosting_method to 'zoom'
Backend: Teacher can update hosting_method to 'both'
Backend: Member can view lesson with hosting_method field
Backend: Member cannot update hosting_method (403 Forbidden)
Backend: All lessons have valid hosting_method field
Backend: Lesson response has all required fields
Frontend: 'The Room' branding visible in header with logo
Frontend: Lesson Editor shows 'Class Hosting Method' card
Frontend: All 3 hosting options visible (In-App Video, Zoom Only, Both Options)
Frontend: hosting_method='in_app' shows only Video Room option for students
Frontend: hosting_method='zoom' shows only Zoom option for students
Frontend: hosting_method='both' shows both Video Room and Zoom options
Frontend: NEXT tab shows YouTube fallback and Teacher Notes
Frontend: AFTER tab shows Discussion and Resources sections
Frontend: Teacher can save hosting_method changes
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Set first lesson hosting_method to 'both' after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebranding complete: 'The Room' shows in header with door logo. hosting_method field fully implemented. Backend: LessonBase model has hosting_method with default='both'. Frontend: LessonEditor.jsx shows Class Hosting Method card with 3 clickable options. LessonDetail.jsx NOW tab conditionally renders Video Room and/or Zoom based on hosting_method. Test verified all 3 hosting_method values work correctly for both teacher and member views.
